title: 2Pcs Kitchen Sink Plug Strainer, 78mm Diameter Kitchen Sink Strainer with 2 Bonus Multi-Size Silicone Seals 304 Stainless Steel Leak-Proof Drainer Plug, 22 Holes & Smooth Shape, JT-SP506-NX
features: Pool Time for Veggies: Nothing is more frustrating than seeing your sink drained when you are about to soak in the veggies, not anymore; use our premium quality leak-proof plugs for sinks to put a lockdown on the water and hefty plumbing bills

Not an Ordinary Plug: 22 Small holes, smooth shape, and round edges, our sink drainer plug is a perfect definition of a flat sitting plug cum strainer which detains tiny waste particles that rot and prevents your sink from stinking

Customize the Fit: Our sink plugs stainless steel pop up comes with 1 extra multi-size silicone seals to help you customize the fit and make it eligible for almost all sinkholes so you do not have to worry even if you switch houses frequently

Dishes Without Disgust: Gone are the days of nauseating due to the pungent smell of the food particles and gross water; our 78mm diameter kitchen sink plug replacement stays intact while canceling the disgust

Versatile Use: Use our sturdy kitchen plug cum strainer to put your life at ease; it is designed to seize the long hair that breaks up with you while shampooing and to trap the food residues while doing the dishes - now beat that!
description: Product Description Patented Design To provide a better experience to our customers, we have allocated 22 holes to our strainer. Steel Spacer 304 stainless steel material provides superior rust-proofing and long-lasting performance. Silicone Rings To solve any diameter sizing problems, we have added an extra ring. Steel Ball Provides additional support to the strainer so it maintains balance and firmness.
